candidate.title: The Case With No Ending
clues: A torn page corner was found.
The window was slightly open.
A pencil was left on the desk.

candidate.title: The Two-Suspect Puzzle
clues: Crumbs were found by the back door.
The oven was still warm.
A delivery van was parked outside.

solution.explanation: The crumb trail leads to the kitchen.

candidate.title: The Wrong Name Mystery

suspects.name: Ben
suspects.publicStatement: I was near the punch bowl.

clues: A muddy footprint was near the trophy table.
The ribbon box was left open.
A glove was found by the gate.

solution.explanation: This name matches no suspect above.

candidate.title: The Duplicate Trouble
candidate.problem: A stapler went missing from the front desk.

suspects.name: Sam
suspects.publicStatement: I was filing papers all morning.

suspects.name: Sam
suspects.publicStatement: I was in a meeting all morning.

clues: A sticky note was found under the desk.
The drawer was left open.
A pen was missing its cap.

solution.explanation: Priya was closest to the desk.

candidate.title: The Case of the Missing Knife
candidate.problem: A chef's knife went missing from the block.

suspects.name: Ivy
suspects.publicStatement: I was closing out the register.

clues: The knife block had one empty slot.
A towel was left on the counter.
The back door was unlocked.

solution.explanation: Sal had access to the block last.

candidate.title: The Unfair Ending
candidate.problem: A signed first edition went missing from the shelf.

suspects.name: Owen
suspects.privateReasoning: He restocked a different aisle the whole time.

suspects.name: Dana
suspects.publicStatement: I was browsing the poetry section.
suspects.privateReasoning: She was actually browsing poetry the whole time.

suspects.name: Rick
suspects.publicStatement: I dropped off a package and left.
suspects.privateReasoning: He secretly kept a spare key from a previous delivery, which is never mentioned anywhere else in the case.

clues: The shelf had a small gap.
A receipt was found on the floor.
The front bell didn't ring around closing time.

solution.explanation: Rick used a spare key that only he and the reader of this explanation know about.

candidate.title: The Coin Toss Case
candidate.problem: A pair of goggles went missing from the lost-and-found bin.

suspects.name: Yara
suspects.publicStatement: I was near the lost-and-found bin at 3pm.
suspects.privateReasoning: She was near the bin, no more or less than Finn.

suspects.name: Finn
suspects.publicStatement: I was near the lost-and-found bin at 3pm too.
suspects.privateReasoning: He was near the bin, no more or less than Yara.

suspects.name: Cass
suspects.publicStatement: I was checking in guests across the pool.
suspects.privateReasoning: She was nowhere near the bin all afternoon.

clues: A towel was left near the bin.
The bin lid was left open.
Two sets of wet footprints led away from the bin.

solution.explanation: Yara and Finn were both there, but Yara gets picked.
